category_sources: source_facts.description says library and tools for ESE Database files; official GitHub README says libesedb accesses Extensible Storage Engine Database File format used by Windows Search, Mail, Exchange, and Active Directory.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libesedb; official GitHub repository and wiki use libesedb.
docs_sources: Official README points to the project documentation at the GitHub wiki and a Building page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/libyal/libesedb, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables esedbexport/esedbinfo; official README describes ESE DB access and related Windows applications.
